narrative:
Camp Creek Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 623 registered voters, with 63.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
